repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
titles_tesim: Two religious debates between a Moslem prince and a Christian monk in presence of the Caliph
contents_tesim: Two religious debates between a Moslem prince and a Christian monk in presence of the Caliph
full_text_tesim: Beginning of first debate lost. Second debate is between a monk (Ibrahim at-Tabarani) and a prince (Abd ar-Rahman ibn nbd al-Malik ibn Salih al-Hashimi). Subject of second debate is the sonship of Christ to God and God’s Trinity
Minor decorative tailpiece, f. 68v | Geometric decoration, f. 109r, cross
